coreIssue: Brian's frequent travel as a Food Critic Manager may be impacting his energy levels and motivation, potentially affecting his ability to focus on key priorities. This 1:1 should explore how he's managing these challenges and what support he needs from you.
openingQuestion: What impact has the recent travel had on your energy and ability to focus on your main priorities?
listenFor: whether travel is affecting his energy levels
if they are still aligned with their main priorities
whether he needs more support from you
avoid: do not assume he is coping well with travel
do not suggest solutions without hearing his perspective
goodOutcome: You and Brian have agreed on one adjustment to his workload or travel schedule to better support his energy and focus.
suggestedAction: Discuss with Brian any immediate workload adjustments and check back in two weeks to assess impact.
